# Hobbit-sense

> [!abstract] ⚪ Event · Cost: **2** · Neutral

---

Play only if each of your heroes is a **_Hobbit._**
**Combat Action:** Enemies engaged with you do not attack this round. You cannot declare attacks this round.

---
